name: ENDURA
short_description: Follow the journey of ex-convict, Jack Jr as he traverse the broken realm of Yagra to finish vital deliveries by utilizing grappling mechanics akin to Spiderman but with guns and swords, and hunting down titans reminisce to Monster Hunter.
detailed_description:
ENDURA is hack-n-slash action adventure game that is inspired by air traversal of Spiderman mixed with big monsters reminisce to Monster Hunter.

Embark on an epic journey as Jack Jr, an ex-convict who is being offered a chance to turn his life around by an organization. He needs to brave his way through monsters and grapples his way around to delivers important packages to the survivors of broken world of Yagra.

FEATURES


  • Hack-N-Slash Action Adventure - Play as Jack Jr as he traverse the realm of Yagra, engaging with monsters in high paced action combat.
  • Air Parkour - Utilize the grapple to move quickly in the air to make your journey easier.
  • Stylized Art Style - Experience the beauty of Realm of Yagra that is powered by Unreal Engine 4.
  • Asian Inspired Bunian - Implemented into the character design with some influence from Malaysian arts and culture.
